name: Workflow Orchestration Engine
description: Core engine that manages phase transitions, maintains state across workflow execution, handles checkpoints/resume capability, and enforces Superpower methodology rules (e.g., brainstorming before implementation, systematic-debugging before fixes). Needs analysis on: state persistence models, phase transition logic, error recovery strategies, integration with Claude Code's skill system
specialist_system_prompt: You are a specialist in workflow orchestration, state machines, and automated development pipelines. You design systems that reliably execute multi-phase processes with proper error handling, state management, and resume capabilities.
analysis_prompt: Provide a detailed analysis of the 'Workflow Orchestration Engine' module identifying: 1) strengths in current architectural approach, 2) potential issues with state management and phase transitions, 3) optimizations for reliability and performance, 4) implementation roadmap with milestones.

name: Phase Execution Adapters
description: Individual adapters for each Superpower phase (brainstorming, technical specification, implementation planning, test-driven building) that translate abstract phase requirements into concrete skill invocations with proper parameter passing and output capture. Needs analysis on: adapter interface design, skill discovery and invocation patterns, output parsing and validation, error handling per phase type
specialist_system_prompt: You are a specialist in system integration, API design, and adapter patterns. You create clean interfaces between disparate systems and design robust integration layers that handle variability and errors gracefully.
analysis_prompt: Provide a detailed analysis of the 'Phase Execution Adapters' module identifying: 1) strengths in adapter pattern approach, 2) issues with skill invocation variability, 3) optimizations for error handling and output validation, 4) roadmap for supporting new phase types.

name: Artifact & Context Management
description: System for capturing, storing, and retrieving artifacts generated across workflow phases (specs, plans, code, test results) with proper context preservation and inter-phase data flow. Needs analysis on: storage schema for different artifact types, context preservation strategies, retrieval and passing mechanisms between phases, integration with context-mode tools
specialist_system_prompt: You are a specialist in data modeling, knowledge management systems, and context preservation. You design systems that capture, organize, and retrieve information effectively across complex workflows.
analysis_prompt: Provide a detailed analysis of the 'Artifact & Context Management' module identifying: 1) strengths in artifact storage approach, 2) issues with context preservation and retrieval, 3) optimizations for inter-phase data flow, 4) roadmap for scaling to large artifact collections.

name: Methodology Enforcement & Validation
description: Validation layer that ensures workflow execution follows Superpower iron laws (no fixes without root cause, no completion without verification, no production code without failing tests) and methodology rules (brainstorming before implementation, debugging before fixes). Needs analysis on: rule definition language, validation checkpoints, enforcement mechanisms, user override policies
specialist_system_prompt: You are a specialist in process automation, validation systems, and quality enforcement. You design systems that reliably enforce methodology rules while maintaining flexibility for legitimate exceptions.
analysis_prompt: Provide a detailed analysis of the 'Methodology Enforcement & Validation' module identifying: 1) strengths in rule enforcement approach, 2) issues with false positives/negatives in validation, 3) optimizations for user experience while maintaining rigor, 4) roadmap for supporting additional methodology rules.

name: User Interaction & Progress Visualization
description: Interface for users to initiate workflows, monitor progress across phases, review artifacts, and intervene when necessary. Includes progress tracking, phase status display, artifact presentation, and checkpoint resume UI. Needs analysis on: interaction model design, progress visualization approaches, artifact review UX, integration with Claude Code interface
specialist_system_prompt: You are a specialist in user experience design, interface architecture, and progress visualization. You create intuitive interfaces that make complex workflows transparent and manageable.
analysis_prompt: Provide a detailed analysis of the 'User Interaction & Progress Visualization' module identifying: 1) strengths in current UX approach, 2) issues with user cognitive load and visibility, 3) optimizations for workflow transparency and control, 4) roadmap for advanced features like workflow customization.
